title: Modular Unit Conversion Suite
description: Build a modular conversion toolkit for length, temperature, and weight.
solution:
def c_to_f(c): return (c * 9/5) + 32
def f_to_c(f): return (f - 32) * 5/9
def km_to_miles(km): return km * 0.621371
def miles_to_km(m): return m / 0.621371
solutionExpl: Encapsulates mathematical conversions into clean single-responsibility functions.
